rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative relationship to Educ. Code §21.3541, which governs principal appraisal and professional development systems. No statutory interaction exists.
quote: The commissioner by rule shall establish and shall administer a comprehensive appraisal and professional development system for principals.
_note: No conflict identified; the rule text concerns principal appraisal systems and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
